title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate II Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for Various Project Associate II Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in B.V.Sc, B.Pharm, or B.E/ B.Tech can apply for these posts. Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last ...
